codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking issue: USD1 is now mapped to the quote balance field (`balances.usdc.available`) in both balance lookup functions used by swap CTA state and token-selector rows.

summary: Review result: pass. Commit dc5da30 fixes the previously failed USD1 mapping by updating both `getTokenBalance` and token-selector `getBalance` so USD1 no longer falls back to zero, resolving the false insufficient-balance behavior.
